official_code_release.timing_boundary: The audited exact commit is 85 days after immutable arXiv v1. The preceding de128241274d294dd83639e79b285f225fe5bfab commit is dated 2026-03-05; GitHub compare shows that the pinned commit changes only pyproject.toml and uv.lock to upgrade LiteLLM. This supports source-level correspondence for the rubric package but does not prove the exact paper-time experimental implementation.
official_code_release.verification: A fresh isolated uv environment executed the pinned release test suite: 10 passed in 2.76 seconds. Tests cover typed feature conversion and trajectory prompt conversion; they do not reproduce model training or any paper result.

official_model_release.weights_download_boundary: The 8.05 GB weight shards were not duplicated locally. Their immutable revision, sizes, LFS SHA-256 identifiers, config, model card, and tensor index were preserved. No inference replay was attempted.
official_model_release.inspectability_boundary: The release provides weights and a generic 27-output classification head, but config labels are only LABEL_0 through LABEL_26 and the model card says 26 labels (25 rubric features plus success). The release therefore does not itself provide an auditable output-index-to-rubric/success mapping.

unreleased_or_not_found: 154k production trace corpus and eligibility manifest
outcome joins, missingness ledger, PR/commit/segment identifiers, and split assignments
o3 annotation outputs and human rubric-development records
critic training code, loss weights, checkpoints, and training logs
SWE-bench trajectory IDs, score rows, selection orders, and early-stopping records
SFT selection rows, training configuration, seeds, and result records
paper analysis code, confidence intervals, and cost ledger
